Title: Tax type = ""FR020100"" > Taxes are calculated without taking into account shipping value
Expected Result: Taxes remain the same regardless of the shipping method.
Preconditions:
1. Select "FR020100" as tax type in settings of the shipping method
2. Tax Provider must be: Avalara Tax Provider in store tax providers.
![](index.php?/attachments/get/39269)

Title: ""FR020100"" tax type is off > Taxes are calculated taking into account shipping value
Expected Result: Taxes change depending on the cost of the shipping method.
Preconditions:
1. There is no specified tax type for the shipping method
2. Tax Provider must be: Avalara Tax Provider in store tax providers.
![](index.php?/attachments/get/39269)

Title: Enable BuyOnlinePickupInStore Shipping Method for a Store
Preconditions:
The user has admin access to the back-office.
The store exists in the system.
Steps:
Step Description:
1. Log in to the back-office.
2. Navigate to Stores.
3. Select a store.
4. Locate the Shipping Methods section.
5. Enable BuyOnlinePickupInStore.
6. Save the changes.
Expected Result:
The BuyOnlinePickupInStore shipping method is enabled for the selected store.
The store settings are saved successfully.
Steps (Expected Result):
1. The BuyOnlinePickupInStore shipping method is enabled for the selected store.
The store settings are saved successfully.
Steps (Step):
1. 1. Log in to the back-office.
2. Navigate to Stores.
3. Select a store.
4. Locate the Shipping Methods section.
5. Enable BuyOnlinePickupInStore.
6. Save the changes.

Title: Add a New Pickup Location
Preconditions:
The user has admin access to the back-office.
The BuyOnlinePickupInStore shipping method is enabled for the store.
Steps:
Step Description:
1. Log in to the back-office.
2. Navigate to Stores and select a store.
3. Open the Pickup Locations tab.
4. Click the Add button.
5. Enter valid details for Location Name, Address, Contact Email & Phone, and Fulfillment Center.
6. Save the location.
Expected Result:
A new pickup location is added successfully.
The location is displayed in the Pickup Locations list.
Steps (Expected Result):
1. A new pickup location is added successfully.
The location is displayed in the Pickup Locations list.
Steps (Step):
1. 1. Log in to the back-office.
2. Navigate to Stores and select a store.
3. Open the Pickup Locations tab.
4. Click the Add button.
5. Enter valid details for Location Name, Address, Contact Email & Phone, and Fulfillment Center.
6. Save the location.

Title: Edit an Existing Pickup Location
Preconditions: At least one pickup location exists.
Steps:
Step Description:

4. Edit any field (e.g., address or contact email).
5. Save the changes.

The edited pickup location is updated successfully.

2. Navigate to Stores → Pickup Locations.

4. Edit any field (e.g., address or contact email).
5. Save the changes.

Title: Verify Multiple Selection in Transfer Fulfillment Centers
Preconditions:
User has admin access to the back-office.
At least two fulfillment centers exist.
Steps:
Step Description:
1. Log in to the back-office.
2. Navigate to Stores → Pickup Locations.
3. Right click 'Manage' an existing location.
4. In the 'Transfer Fulfillment Centers' field, select multiple options.
5. Save the changes.
Expected Result:
The selected fulfillment centers should be saved and correctly displayed in the list.
Steps (Expected Result): 1. The selected fulfillment centers should be saved and correctly displayed in the list.
Steps (Step):
1. 1. Log in to the back-office.
2. Navigate to Stores → Pickup Locations.
3. Right click 'Manage' an existing location.
4. In the 'Transfer Fulfillment Centers' field, select multiple options.
5. Save the changes.

Title: Disable Active Status of a Pickup Location
Preconditions: At least one pickup location exists.
Steps:
Step Description:
1. Log in to the back-office.
2. Navigate to Stores → Pickup Locations.
3. Select an existing location.
4. Toggle the 'Active' switch to disable the location.
5. Save the changes.
6. Go to frontend > Checkout > Pickup
7. Check the inactive location
Expected Result:
The location’s status should update successfully. The inactive location is not returned in frontend
Steps (Expected Result): 1. The location’s status should update successfully. The inactive location is not returned in frontend
Steps (Step):
1. 1. Log in to the back-office.
2. Navigate to Stores → Pickup Locations.
3. Select an existing location.
4. Toggle the 'Active' switch to disable the location.
5. Save the changes.
6. Go to frontend > Checkout > Pickup
7. Check the inactive location
